name: libunicode-utf8-perl
title: libunicode-utf8-perl
summary: encoding and decoding of UTF-8 encoding form
description:
encoding and decoding of UTF-8 encoding form
Unicode::UTF8 provides functions
to encode and decode UTF-8 encoding form
as specified by Unicode and ISO/IEC 10646:2011.
.
Performs between 600% and 1200% faster than Encode.
